历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 1729; in 2023, due to a gap, it plummeted to about 5794; in 2024, it quickly rebounded to around 1979; in 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was about 5632 (no re-selection group), showing overall drastic fluctuations and a pattern of significant volatility in recent two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5632; the science enrollment plan was 55 from 2022 to 2024, increased to 56 in 2025 for Physics Category, and to 57 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 1.8% compared to 2025, with minimal impact on competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation was rated as 'highly recommended' in social popularity, Energy and Power as 'recommended', Computer/Electronic Information continues to be hot; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Ningxia is about 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (about 65,897), with no significant change in competition intensity; North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is located in the capital Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Ningxia candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is very small (about 2% in 2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with insignificant local preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5632, a slight expansion of 1 student in 2026 (expansion of about 1.8% theoretically shifts the ranking upward by about 60 to 5692), the sustained high social popularity of Electrical/Energy majors driving up competition, and the total number of candidates basically unchanged, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift upward from 5692 to about 5700, with a range of 5200-6200.
